reference: Hello. My age is twenty-five. Last month, my periods were delayed by seven days. This month, I want to conceive as my husband returned after a long time from the United Kingdom. I really want to conceive this coming month. My cycle is thirty-three to thirty-four days every month. When is the fertility date? I got my periods on April twenty-eight. I have been taking Endogest one hundred since May five. Will it help me to conceive this month? Or should I take more tablets after the course of fifteen tablets?
text: Hello, my age is twenty-five. Last month my periods were delayed by seven days. This month I want to conceive as my husband returned after a long time from the United Kingdom. I really want to conceive this coming month. My cycle is thirty-three to thirty-four days every month. When is the fertility date? I got my periods on April twenty-eighth. I have been taking Endogest one hundred since May five. Will it help me to conceive this month, or should I take more tablets after the course of fifteen tablets?
